title: Calabrian Wine Tasting Evening
description: A journey through the finest wines of Calabria paired with dishes from our chef. Cirò DOC, Greco di Bianco and more surprises. Limited seats.

title: Blue Fish Festival
description: Special menu dedicated to Tyrrhenian blue fish: anchovies, sardines, mackerel and amberjack prepared in ten variations from the Calabrian tradition.

title: Dinner Under the Stars
description: The terrace lights up with candles for a romantic evening with a surprise menu by the chef, live music and views of the Aeolian Islands.

title: Cooking Class: Fresh Calabrian Pasta
description: Learn to make fileja, scilatelle and other traditional Calabrian pasta with Chef Marco. Includes final tasting with wine.
